text: In this moment, I feel a heightened sense of self-awareness—perhaps even a little uneasy. The modern and open environment around me, filled with glass and neon, draws my introspection into sharper relief. When I read the illuminated words on the wall—descriptions of confusion and misunderstanding—I notice how they echo my internal state. I wonder whether others sense it too, or if these feelings are private, carried quietly like so many in-between thoughts. I feel surrounded and yet alone, striving to make sense not just of the space but of my place within it.
